rule: Use these images as template references only. Do not edit, overwrite, regenerate, delete, recolor, crop, rename, or replace them unless the user explicitly asks to alter this source of truth or create a new template version.

layouts.usage: Side-by-side comparison for tools, AI products, languages, services, offers, or physical products.

productionRule: New posts must be created in content/social-media/instagram/{accountId}/{slug}/ and rendered from a new post.json.
